textByHash.e278bea33f1da75cb1f7ffa5e3d912db0abb5fe5: Ah, you must be . I've been expectorating you.
textByHash.b34cb5ee2a87b8ab015b40f19a24f16833b8550f: I have. The Sisters Grime told me you'd be dropping in.
textByHash.8db855cefb61430e835c82ed0ed6ec455aa40417: Well, I could, but I need a little more motivation than that.
textByHash.43d56477b2b84d6df7ef19951118526c93e2b988: I didn't get this far by giving out help freely to every adventurer who came my way.
textByHash.c3052650c4dd5f474c56b9e5011e236129e3cd7b: Ah, that's mincemeat to my ears!
textByHash.ce047d7044246af154ba60210bc09f1e1f67f935: No thank you! Your unrefined caterwauling would only draw attention.
textByHash.a740df9bc19e9aa854973b7a15dc3491db8b4335: How about I test your ratcatching mettle instead?
textByHash.d73d87d68960b7753b44cdafe64ed6e7238940ac: Oh, your hands are full. Don't worry, I'll hold onto this map until you can jettison all that rubbish.
textByHash.29984a2f203d35fa71218c11576b9e792ce393d3: Take a good long look at this map.
textByHash.698d43f2e79cc4c24b8073c5d32e0f5f2eeca3bb: A client of mine, a merchant of some repute, is having a sorbet.
textByHash.3b722e5b64ee18054655f56075f62e1168d1f6f9: A soy - a fancy party. Don't interrupt me again.
textByHash.87021c7b47779260302c633288fe5999e757ae5c: This client of mine has a problem, a small furry one.
textByHash.9c6cade19203d57eb64cb055c8f53eee2f05d61b: No, you fool! A rat problem.
textByHash.1064223e70dcf9747346797186c6e9111f066486: Ah, but it's not that simple. Here's your first lesson - we ratcatchers must be discreet.
textByHash.119a133dc477df6f3e30c7b6239e6a628c27f12f: Our wealthier clients would be ruined if word got out that their fancy mansions were filled with vermin.
textByHash.b98be31f38faa01f6fb1bc37b658dc462cb4f514: Now just in case, I'm going to cast a spell on you that will allow you carry out this task with some element of safety.
textByHash.ab2b026b7ca31ce3e1dd1fe4c7690fb65bb4c1b5: Not quite. If you're spotted, this spell will teleport you a short distance away and render the last few seconds of your discoverer's memory blank.
textByHash.baaaa5b77aac37214ed2d9d65191c7a3bf94eb9f: Oh my, no. Can you imagine if all the riffraff in Ardougne got wind of this?
textByHash.b126dbaf7427236bc54dd957b11d0f42b6ff95f7: We already have a serious crime problem.
textByHash.459eac40ca1e3a336a224f795232c3b9cd73c6f3: But there's plenty more I can teach you about ratcatching... if you complete the task I've set you.
textByHash.c85a3afff891ba873b618988a628701bda6319d1: Of course! Use a cat to catch the rats.
textByHash.1d081355694a3cc3a50ba747abcac35a64282383: Don't look a gilt horse in the mouth!
textByHash.8cd91a1c0f40072de48e647f367a209454317b23: I'll gift you no such thing! Now go on, get out of here!
textByHash.fc87c8102122aed3eff6b51f84fb5cd6163673c2: Ah, you're back. Have you completed your mission?
textByHash.87e38f6971d498009fead2831c54ca49292ce3f8: Here you go, don't lose this one.
textByHash.1dca4bf2023d7f1f717a6fba16b9023409d3b4a9: Haven't I given you the map already? I'm sure I have. I can't afford to be throwing maps around nilly willy.
textByHash.cc9e36146d4665c13e018cdcb92c3a2045933f1f: Read the directions on the map to get to the manor. Once there, eliminate any rats you see with your cat and return to me unseen. Got it?
textByHash.6575fad57b62f16f72c025a8e654f8e44ccbd9c4: Ah , aren't you just the ticket?
textByHash.c8b2343192202f95a35a9219cf18dfb9b4edf368: Of course! If you want to learn about ratcatching, get yourself to the Rat Pits here in Ardougne.
textByHash.b9c9f81ea7c27606dca2b835e7e5ee202a688561: It's a great place for training kittens. Just look at Bones here!
textByHash.7fd1148e57b8d5697b092944d098ffb0ce9b29bf: Ah, well. My good friend Hooknosed Jack can tell you all about those.
textByHash.518b2007e12bb192e679817bb93699700f4d70b9: He has the oldest cat I've ever seen.
textByHash.88b1a3b78dbbe5994461730a05e033fef1eb53d4: He hangs around in a rather unfashionable part of Varrock. He likes a good scrap, does Jack.
textByHash.6fe1b6bf40d37b1b1e309d665c59bd5a744342df: I'll tell him to look out for you.
textByHash.ffef70813b8fa506e885ff2b66b54e1197e0a5b9: The pits lie below this very pub.
textByHash.fe3e3421ad2aed62f9d621a13c1544cf44cf1889: See that ladder there? That's the way in.
textByHash.9c90cf872ca91acedfee917b157e793be419d7ac: I'd have thought it was self-exploratory. Here, have a manual.
textByHash.85d4c24a9bb8f710b6f540f3c8e9caca0036de32: Here, take this, you might find it useful.
textByHash.5ad887f70b2b7e117f41ca3ffba9ad599fba4a0d: Who are you, and what do you want?
textByHash.c32b421cf596f36f4986c33cffa85372fbf5d914: I don't know you, therefore I will not answer any questions. Now be gone from here, you're drawing attention.
textByHash.239ff86e3a0cd406b49537e462f93e223eeff4c3: They live in the sewers below Varrock.
textByHash.d8f6473fdac54870c31be30829effcee6ce8081d: Please don't say hello from me.
textByHash.173043aa50bf77da2523d8c36680626627548f8b: If the old rascal's lungs haven't given up yet, you should find him in Keldagrim.
textByHash.18b4943df410888a076fff480d9eb457821a165b: Port Sarim is your best bet.
textByHash.56cf20936d32a5dd5312fe1a8cc58ea19c975608: You'll find her in Port Sarim, probably in the Rat Pits there.
textByHash.07093401c7289ee7c2f991c7b65b6e24d7d48f8a: Well, sort of. She's the unofficial leader of the Ratcatchers.
textByHash.6c8067766cf84ac43cec170f54ca0edcd28a20be: Here take this, you might find it useful.
textByHash.8026bf52b847bcd743269d7f98cf53c023091069: What do you want to know?
textByHash.4af0c5133f5d2d686c7d193b815f77b5fadf510b: You should wear an Amulet of Catspeak. It will allow you to organise tactics with your cat.
textByHash.fade9a4ca2d0c7aefe8078cee70fa0669622dce1: Well, that depends on your outlook, whether you're ready to risk your cat's life or not and how defensive or aggressive you want your cat to be.
textByHash.da5aebadc58bb6d237b45e5ab0ea1507df081746: Well if that's the case then you're left with two choices.
textByHash.c88739adf3c8b6b7012b30cee6c8a24618271026: You can adopt an ultra defensive strategy, which increases your cat's hitpoints and defence but causes it to flee sooner.
textByHash.9ab6c1e2d6d63f8e06acac731893dfeb6d438280: Or you can adopt a less defensive strategy, which will allow your cat to stay in the pit for longer.
textByHash.f56bcddfd9343c49ae5faf1b1a30ce23d0206abe: In that case you should tell your cat: 'Just take care of yourself, cat.'
textByHash.cd1bfe51bb68853b879970b373d618e6e89f8d09: Do you have any other questions about the pits?
textByHash.0d36498a2ee491f7cf15547773f12d2ae543fadc: In that case you should tell your cat: 'Stay in for as long as you can.'
textByHash.e41bfea4c1720be75934a7edb7add327a0f5f3d2: In that case you are left with two choices.
textByHash.fcab10ba4a5090ba31825e6c8fe988e20ae79211: You could go for all out attack which will boost your cat's attack and strength, but weaken it.
textByHash.78b6b89d1b963d59c8a104437bfbdf7234dd5821: Or, go for a less aggressive stance, which will increase your cat's strength and attack to a lesser degree, but carries no defensive penalties.
textByHash.b8b4da058a39643d73626f1ae05666b59358352e: In that case you should tell your cat: 'Go berserk!'
textByHash.713332eff28715f95826aacfe2f3044ee2d46d43: In that case you should tell your cat: 'No guts, no glory!'
textByHash.327139bc7ea6ba37d4a08ea42e2f06e1544e941f: It depends on what kind of cat you have.
textByHash.21ee3fd522484d9e89fcf2788d4bfe1081a7c0a0: In the Ardougne pits, your kitten will grow up faster whether it wins or loses.
textByHash.c944aac4835a567235b9f7a15f667a43f23726f1: It will gain more experience, it'll be happier, and it'll be fed, too.
textByHash.39567c5ee69ed469fcfa6011732d846fb8c99d76: Why on Gielinor would I do that?
textByHash.8f8d0c8e9463dcdd661ddac44a100ea90887173e: Pizzazz, you say? I'll think about it.
textByHash.473a37b70774562538b7877fda7779fa2f8620d7: What's your name and your business here?
textByHash.4b00084e6e84c08554ecf23648b424846f386c04: That just isn't the ticket. I don't know you nor I will not answer any questions. Now get gone from here, you'll attract unwanted attention to me.
textByHash.1c015ba4e6a89745bb4bc7515a240b11dfda76d5: Ah aren't you just the ticket?
textByHash.ce3284c35786d178a19012ee7efedcfb802d4464: You can find those vile harpies in the sewers of Varrock.
textByHash.462c8d574bf37e42f94b3753544060f56b22108b: ~Jimmy shudders when he thinks of them.
textByHash.e12d22bc222b79894796a10b4a1144471061a8d9: If you ask me it's too good a place for them.
textByHash.8fdb621a082e2c273a8e27ba3c90c530c77fca8f: He should be in the roughest area of Varrock knowing him. He likes a good scrap does Jack.
textByHash.36565adfe617fc4bc5c94920eabeed6bde5cc75e: You won't find him around here. They wouldn't let a filthy old dwarf like him into a civilised town like this.
textByHash.7657e269456aa9ee0faafa3b6261e88ad81aa0a0: If the old rascal's lungs haven't given up yet, you should find him in Keldagrim, the city of Dwarves.
textByHash.0b4d0843e593d9c94d712b75234b3a411add66ec: Old pugly, my oh my but did she ever get her comeuppance.
textByHash.e365c0fe46be575037668ca5cfd1c13c557222d1: Believe me she deserves everything she gets!
textByHash.76308556a30b80e13c32ae0fda393cde9932e99e: I couldn't possibly tell you, but be careful around her.
textByHash.a5b5931ce42e7fbf3569b1c700354301618d8a8b: She'll be in or around Port Sarim I reckon.
textByHash.6b10b77fd4c3e06ebd3b346e82dd2da71e0a0ac3: You'll find her in Port Sarim, probably in the ratpits.
textByHash.c1f3bab4ede11a516f5b1362215613314e07c4f6: Well sort of, she's the unofficial head of the rat catchers.
textByHash.ff510b8773e1f9edff0a01a3e67ec6404bc7c1c2: Here take this, you might find it useful
textByHash.720043b3d23d48ad48b3633bf5635b995d643780: Well what do you want to know?
textByHash.509d4f7e4d911d6e645771640a1485f16493c266: Well if that's the case then your are left with two choices.
textByHash.be5b39c0cf0ec6b55f2a5840f21b136743c6d9d2: You can adopt an ultra defensive strategy, which increases your cat's hitpoints and defence, the drawback to this is that your cat will flee sooner.
textByHash.7a96913730577a55b240d9c5d8c4d15015bd3888: Your other option is to adopt a less defensive strategy which will allow your cat to stay in the pit for longer.
textByHash.62bac88e4f09c6740dd7ca0c26cd025a092ca92e: In that case you should tell your cat, 'Just take care of yourself cat.'
textByHash.9c040c41b9e76ed31ee7c483556936870e0c04dc: In that case you should tell your cat, 'Stay in for as long as you can.'
textByHash.5848347c398ebafd4bf065e8cc3a17dd0a572011: You could go for all out attack which will boost your cat's attack and strength, but weaken it
textByHash.ee585f351f6902ad064abecb024be929c0ab7179: or go for a less aggressive stance which will increase your cat's strength and attack to a lesser degree, but carries no defensive penalties.
textByHash.1c721dc3a5e6e5f940e82688c72ad6bdf8e6f78d: In that case you should tell your cat, 'Go berserk!'
textByHash.04f5baacb4b4a34b8a187c167171e1552480625c: In that case you should tell this to your cat, 'No guts, no glory!'
textByHash.42b0d98cff10b3e8fd13ea83f3be2fd517fef786: In the Ardougne pits your kitten will grow up faster, whether it wins or loses.
textByHash.618927be706a43180f31cd36790dcfb8c7e5d46a: It will gain more experience and will become happier and will be fed.
